items.title: Growth and Investment Opportunities in the AI in Oncology Market 2025-2029: A Global Industry Analysis
items.description: The AI in oncology market is poised for significant growth driven by increasing oncological data complexity, demand for personalized medicine, and advancements in AI technology. Key opportunities lie in software solutions and services for various cancer types. The market is led by major players like Google and IBM, with expansion potential across global regions.Dublin, Oct. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "AI in Oncology Market 2025-2029" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. items.title: Zyphra Taps IBM, AMD To Build Next-Gen AI Superagent
items.description: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) and Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) announced on Wednesday a strategic collaboration to provide Zyphra, a San Francisco-based open-source AI company, with advanced AI infrastructure. Under a multi-year agreement, IBM will host a large cluster of AMD Instinct MI300X GPUs on IBM Cloud to support Zyphra’s training of multimodal foundation models, marking one of the largest generative AI training deployments to date using an AMD stack. items.title: The Impact of AI on Today’s Workforce, with IBM and Creighton University
items.description: Today's Marketplace NYSE interview with IBM and the Heider College of Business on upskilling the workforce to increase the growth side of business and ROI.
